mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.entry_no, e.account_id, a.account_name, a.account_type, e.direction, e.amount, CASE WHEN e.account_id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE a.opening_balance + COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN x.direction = 'IN' THEN x.amount ELSE -x.amount END) FROM cash_journal_entry x WHERE x.tenant_id = e.tenant_id AND x.account_id = e.account_id AND x.deleted_flag = 0 AND x.status IN ('ARCHIVED', 'REVERSED') AND x.business_date >= a.opening_date AND (x.business_date < e.business_date OR (x.business_date = e.business_date AND x.id <= e.id)) ), 0) END AS running_balance, e.business_date, e.counterparty_name, e.summary, e.project_id, e.contract_id, e.source_type, e.source_id, e.status, e.closure_due_at, e.archived_by, e.archived_at, e.reverse_of_entry_id, e.reversal_entry_id, e.version, e.created_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_file f WHERE f.tenant_id = e.tenant_id AND f.business_type = 'CASH_JOURNAL' AND f.business_id = e.id AND f.deleted_flag = 0 ) AS attachment_count FROM cash_journal_entry e LEFT JOIN fund_account a ON a.id = e.account_id AND a.tenant_id = e.tenant_id AND a.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE ORDER BY e.business_date DESC, e.id DESC
